name: Toffee-Peanut Bites
recipeIngredient: 4 Chocolate covered toffee bars, chopped (about 1.4 ounces each)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
In a large bowl, beat together flour, margarine or butter, sugar, peanut butter, brown sugar, baking soda, vanilla extract, salt, and egg until well combined.
Using a wooden spoon, stir in chopped chocolate covered toffee bars.
Shape the dough into 3/4-inch balls. Place the balls about 1 inch apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
Press half of the peanuts into the top of each ball.
Bake cookies for 10 minutes or until lightly browned.
Remove cookies from oven and transfer them to a wire rack to cool.
Store cooled cookies in a tightly covered container. Makes about 7-1/2 dozen cookies.
